title: Max Level Info
description: See enchantment & potion level — Sharpness II / V, or Bad Omen I / V
body:
Instantly know how good an enchantment is.
Instead of "Sharpness II" in the item or the enchanting table tooltip, you'll see "Sharpness II / V".

"Sharpness V" or "Mending", however, are left alone since they're the max level. Simple, intuitive, and IMO should have been built-in. It also works with potion effects in a really clean way (I'll add screenshots later). ### Why? "Why would this have to be built-in?": For people who don't like to rely on memory when it comes to numbers. What's different about this mod implementation from the other ones is that it intentionally provides no configuration and is designed to be a subtle vanilla-feeling drop-in-and-forget. I'm not sure that the dark gray color is the perfect choice for preserving the Vanilla feel. If this mod gets enough downloads, we can make a poll to decide whether to leave it dark gray or the initial tooltip color.
